description: N pastel panels slide in one by one (alternating top/bottom) over a chosen backdrop field — one panel per listed item.
whenToUse: A narrated enumeration / list beat where the narrator counts off items (2–5).
generalize: Panel count, the subject inside each panel, and the colours are SLOTS. The backdrop and each panel's field are CHOSEN from the palette to fit the topic — not fixed. Subjects can be anything the list is about (structures, animals, objects, foods, tools...).
produces: one gpt-image-2 illustration per panel (tall ~1:2) -> Remotion EnumerationPanels places + slides + times.

backdrop.note: the field behind the whole row; choose from the palette (cream is typical for this recipe)

item.prompt: gpt-image-2 prompt — MUST start with the STYLE BLOCK, subject + a CHOSEN pastel field colour (rotate between panels), aspect ~1:2 tall, edge-to-edge bg, no text
item.startWord: the narration word this panel lands on (for timing)

rules: Every panel prompt begins with the mandatory STYLE BLOCK (production-rules §1a).
Backdrop and each panel's field are CHOSEN from the palette; rotate panel fields; red is semantic-only.
Panel startFrames map to the narration word onsets (Groq), not guesses.
Fill the screen — panels ~85% of height (production-rules §3).
